zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，上行趋势延续
zh.content:
当前BTC/USD报62096.07美元，24小时上涨0.62%，价格运行于20日均线61014美元上方，显示中短期多头仍占据主导。日内波动区间介于61586至62242美元之间，市场维持高位整理格局，整体趋势偏向震荡上行。

从技术指标来看，MACD值为175.23且位于零轴上方，表明多头动能依然存在，但由于Signal及RSI数据缺失，暂无法确认是否进入超买区域。结合价格持续站稳SMA(20)上方判断，趋势结构依旧健康，短线回调更多视为技术性修正。

关键支撑位关注61586美元附近，该区域为日内低点，也是短期多头防守位置；若跌破，则下方61014美元20日均线支撑值得重点观察。上方阻力位首先关注62242美元，突破后有望进一步挑战62500至63000美元心理关口。

交易策略方面，激进投资者可等待价格有效突破62242美元后顺势跟进，并设置严格止损控制风险；稳健投资者则可关注61586至61014美元支撑区域的回踩机会。当前市场情绪偏乐观，但高位震荡阶段仍需警惕短线获利回吐带来的波动风险。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is showing signs of moderate bullish momentum as it trades around $62,096, slightly above the 20-period simple moving average (SMA) of $61,014. The short-term trend appears to be upward, with price action forming higher lows over the past 24 hours. The minor intraday pullbacks near $61,586 suggest buyers are defending support levels, reinforcing the idea that the market maintains underlying bullish pressure despite limited volatility in the range between $61,500 and $62,250.  

The MACD reading of 175.23, though lacking a signal line for full confirmation, hints at continuing bullish momentum. Traders should be cautious, however, as the absence of an RSI leaves overbought or oversold conditions unclear. The price staying above the SMA(20) generally supports short-term strength, but a sustained move below this moving average could indicate weakening buying pressure. Watching for MACD convergence or divergence will be crucial to identify any early shifts in momentum.  

Key support and resistance levels are currently concentrated at $61,586 and $62,242, respectively. A decisive break above $62,242 could open a path toward the $63,000 psychological level, while a drop below $61,586 may trigger further downside toward $61,000. These levels are critical for managing risk, as intraday traders can consider entry points near support with stop-loss slightly below, while targets should be set just under resistance to capture short-term gains without overextending exposure.  

For trading strategy, a cautious long bias seems reasonable, with confirmation from volume or MACD signals. Scalping within the current range could offer low-risk opportunities, while swing traders might wait for a breakout above $62,250 to enter larger positions. Meanwhile, keeping a protective stop-loss below $61,500 would minimize downside risk in case of abrupt reversals. Overall, the market reflects cautious optimism, requiring disciplined risk management and monitoring of momentum indicators.
